song.title: Overcome
song.presentation: V1 V2 P C V3 P C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G C2 1) Seated above, enthroned in the Father's love .Em7 Dsus4 G Destined to die, poured out for all mankind
[V2] 2) God's only Son, perfect and spotless one He never sinned but suffered as if He did
[P] Pre- Chorus . C All authority . Em D/F# G Every victory is Yours (x2) [C] Chorus . G Em Savior, worthy of honor and glory . D C Worthy of all our praise, . G You overcame . G Em Jesus, awesome in power forever . D C Awesome and great is Your name, . G You overcame
[V3] 3) Power in hand speaking the Father's plan You're sending us out, light in this broken land [B] Bridge .C G We will overcome . Em7 By the blood of the Lamb . D C And the word of our testimony, . G D/F# Everyone overcome
[E] 1) Seated above, enthroned in the Father's love Destined to die, poured out for all mankind 2) God's only Son, perfect and spotless one He never sinned but suffered as if He did Pre- Chorus All authority Every victory is Yours (x2) Chorus Savior, worthy of honor and glory Worthy of all our praise, You overcame Jesus, awesome in power forever Awesome and great is Your name, You overcame 3) Power in hand speaking the Father's plan You're sending us out, light in this broken land Bridge We will overcome By the blood of the Lamb And the word of our testimony, Everyone overcome
